review_title: Amazing Bloomreach alternative
description: Meiro has been a reliable and flexible CDP that solved our regulatory challenges while also improving personalization and ROI. Compared to our previous provider, it’s more transparent, accurate, and truly real-time. I’d definitely recommend it to companies that need both compliance and performance without hidden costs.
author: Yuliia K.
pros: We switched to Meiro last year as we expanded to the Middle East, and it’s been a great decision. The ability to deploy on private cloud or on-prem was critical for us due to data residency regulations, and Meiro handled that smoothly with local AWS deployment. Pricing transparency has also been a big win, unlike Bloomreach, there are no hidden charges for add-ons or data exports, which makes budgeting predictable. The flexible identity stitching rules significantly improved how we consolidate customer profiles across devices and channels, which boosted our personalization accuracy. Finally, the real-time personalization truly works. Thanks to the built-in ETL layer, we can synchronize data instantly and deliver dynamic experiences at scale.
cons: So far, nothing major to point out as a con. The platform and the team have both been excellent and helpful.

review_title: Amazing Bloomreach alternative
description: We moved to Meiro last year, when we expanded our business. The first and main reason was that Meiro supports private cloud and on-prem, that was crucial to us as we must follow country regulations and Meiro allowed us to deploy it on AWS. Another important thing that I want to point out is transparent pricing. While we struggled to get unexpected bills with charges for add-ons and export of extra-data from Bloomreach. With Meiro it’s not a problem anymore and we have clear budget planning without extra charges. Also, compared to Bloomreach, Meiro’s identity stitching rules are flexible. It significantly improved the accuracy of consolidating customer profiles across devices, browsers, and channels and helped us to deliver better personalized experiences. Last but not least, finally it’s true real-time personalisation. Despite everyone talking about real-time, I know that it’s an issue on the market. But the ETL layer built into Meiro helps us synchronise data real-time and dynamically personalise customer interaction.
author: Richard V.
pros: Generally, we’re happy with using Meiro across the board
cons: With cross-platform 1st party data insights, Meiro’s provided us we’ve developed greater knowledge of our customers and improved our marketing activation strategies. With powerful segmentation capabilities, we have turned around sour marketing campaigns and personalized customer communications. That in turn did miracles on our campaign performance — we’re now more effective at retaining and upselling our customers, and we’ve increased customer lifetime value since adopting Meiro CDP. With Meiro CDP we managed to work around 3rd party cookie ban — we are now able to create meaningful and consistent personalized campaigns with engaged users, segment audiences and create lookalikes for enriched ad campaigns. We feed segmented audiences to ad systems for direct contact and as the basis for lookalike prospecting models directly from Meiro’s platform. That, in turn, maximizes our budgets for acquisition. All the Meiro-created segments that we use for active campaigns, in most cases, are our best-performing audiences Meiro’s seamless integration with programmatic ads helps us optimize our campaign budgets and drive more results in real-time.

review_title: A truly composable CDP that nails real-time identity resolution and activation
author: Mike S.
pros: Meiro gives us a private-deployable, “open-box” customer data platform that stitches anonymous and known events into unified profiles in real time, then lets marketing trigger personalised journeys across every channel without waiting for nightly batches.
cons: The interface is powerful but feels geared toward data engineers; initial schema mapping and SQL model setup took longer than expected, and in-app guidance sometimes lags behind new features, so we had to lean on support during the first sprint.

review_title: Efficient data consolidation and actionable insights
description: Meiro consolidates customer data from multiple sources, creating a comprehensive 360-degree view that improves targeting and personalization. Its advanced identity stitching capabilities ensure accurate customer recognition across different platforms. The platform helps businesses optimize their ad spend by refining audience segmentation.
author: Petr D.
pros: Before Meiro, our customer data was scattered across multiple systems, making it difficult to get a unified view of our audience. Meiro solved this problem with its powerful identity stitching and data consolidation features. Now, we have a 360-degree view of our customers, allowing us to engage them with relevant content at the right time.
cons: Nothing, Meiro has exceeded our expectations. contributed to streamlining our work and freed up capacity for further tasks.

review_title: Maximizing value through Meiro CDP deployment
description: Our experience has essentially been summarized in the points above.
author: Petr H.
pros: As implementation partners, we successfully deployed Meiro CDP for one of our clients, delivering measurable results and transforming their approach to customer data management. The project began with a thorough analysis of the client’s existing infrastructure and data sources, which allowed us to design a tailored implementation plan. The process was divided into manageable phases, enabling the client to realize early benefits while we worked on more complex integrations and configurations. During the implementation, we utilized Meiro’s robust ETL and Reverse ETL functionalities to centralize and unify data from multiple systems, including their website, CRM, and offline touchpoints. This ensured that all customer interactions were consolidated into a single platform, creating accurate and actionable customer profiles. The flexibility of Meiro’s identity resolution tools allowed us to address the challenges of cross-device and cross-channel data stitching effectively. Data security and compliance were critical requirements for the client, as they operate in a highly regulated industry. By leveraging Meiro’s on-premise hosting options and granular access management, we ensured the solution met all legal and security standards. This gave the client confidence in using their data while maintaining compliance with regional and global regulations. Meiro’s phased implementation approach proved to be a significant advantage. Early on, the client was able to leverage basic use cases like audience segmentation and personalized campaigns, which delivered immediate improvements in campaign performance and customer engagement. As we continued to optimize the solution, we implemented more advanced functionalities, such as predictive analytics and real-time data activation, further increasing the client’s marketing efficiency. Throughout the project, the Meiro team provided exceptional support, collaborating closely with us to address any challenges and fine-tune the platform to the client’s needs. By the end of the project, the client had a fully operational CDP that broke down their data silos, provided a unified customer view, and significantly improved their ability to personalize customer experiences. This implementation not only met the client’s goals but also demonstrated how Meiro CDP could serve as a foundation for long-term growth. The scalability and adaptability of the platform ensured that the client is now well-equipped to handle future data and marketing challenges.
cons: In the context of other complex CDP solutions, we did not encounter anything that significantly stood out as problematic or challenging.

review_title: Best CDP for real-time engagement and audience insights
description: Eliminates delays in data processing and activation, making it easier to personalize customer experiences in real-time. It improves engagement by allowing businesses to react instantly to user behavior. By reducing dependency on IT for segmentation and campaign execution, it empowers marketing teams to act faster and more independently.
author: Jakub R.
pros: We switched to Meiro after struggling with delayed data processing in our previous CDP. One of the biggest advantages is Meiro’s built-in ETL layer, which allows us to work with real-time data across all our platforms. It’s a game changer for personalized customer experiences—our campaigns now react to user behavior instantly, and we’ve seen a significant uplift in engagement and conversions. Another key benefit is how intuitive the platform is. Unlike other CDPs we’ve tested, our marketing team was able to start creating audience segments and activating campaigns without much training. Also, Meiro’s pricing is transparent—no surprises or unexpected add-on costs, which we faced with our previous vendor. We know exactly what we’re paying for.
cons: We’re very happy with Meiro, but it would be great to have even more pre-built automation templates for faster campaign setup.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My review for Meiro CDP from perspective of CRM specialist in TV media company
author: Martin Š.
pros: "We got Meiro CDP running in Q1 of 2024 so it is still settling down. Though in the short time using the platform I clearly see the added value it has brought to our work with customers data. The identity stitching thing simply works, it is quite flexible to our needs and really brings great context about our customers. Thanks to that we are able to target our audiences with much clearer approach. It is not guessing or hoping that our campaings reach the right customers, we really know who we are targeting now. Using it pretty much daily. What is great, once our data sources have been connected by Meiro team, that's simply it and the platform can do its magic and work with it. We didn't need to prepare the data structure in any specific way or change anything about it. Needed to say, the service provided by Meiro team is great part of using the platform too. They simply know their tool and they do help us with anything we need - or sometimes we don't even know we may need."
cons: Overall the experience has been just pretty good. The tool has its perks here and there (as any other platform) but the Meiro team are constantly working on it.

review_title: Data activation without IT headaches
description: Identity resolution across devices and channels, ensuring accurate customer tracking and engagement. With third-party cookies being phased out, it helps businesses shift toward a first-party data strategy. The platform also speeds up audience activation and personalization, improving marketing effectiveness.
author: Mikhail S.
pros: One of the standout features of Meiro is how independent it allows our marketing team to be. Before, we relied heavily on IT to create and activate customer segments, which slowed down our campaigns. Now, with Meiro, we can do everything ourselves—build audiences, personalize experiences, and launch campaigns seamlessly. Another huge plus is how Meiro helps us get the most out of our first-party data. With third-party cookies disappearing, it was critical for us to have a strong identity resolution strategy. Meiro’s identity stitching capabilities are far ahead of what we’ve seen with other CDPs, helping us track and target users more effectively across devices.
cons: All good, we have been testing different customer database platform, and satisfied

review_title: Finally, a real CDP that is flexible
description: Meiro is a flexible and secure CDP that delivers on its promises. It has helped us stay compliant with strict data privacy regulations, while also enabling real-time personalization and better campaign performance. The level of support and customization truly sets it apart from the big names in the market.
author: Dominik S.
pros: Meiro offers the best level of customization we’ve seen in a CDP. As a bank, data security and privacy were our top priorities, and unlike Salesforce or Adobe, Meiro was able to meet strict APAC requirements for local data hosting. We successfully deployed the CDP on our own on-prem infrastructure, which gave us full compliance and peace of mind. The support team is also exceptional — highly professional, responsive, and proactive in sharing best practices. The built-in ETL/Reverse ETL layer lets us process data in real time and deliver highly relevant offers to customers at the right moment. Segments created in Meiro consistently become our best-performing audiences, driving higher conversions and ROI.
cons: Would love to see even more native marketing automation features, but overall the platform has been excellent.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Sophisticated CDP solution by far
description: I joined Meiro collaboration when we had completed the initial integration and started working with data, creating the first scenarios, and expanding the implementation. Our company has a large portfolio of seemingly autonomous websites that we needed to keep track of and Meiro is dealing with it very well. With the connection of our tools (and some from external providers) and databases, it provides valuable opportunities.
author: Marek O.
pros: I appreciate approach of the team, their efforts to find solution even in complex situations. Even if it might be just a marginal topic for their business. Meiro in general, is a sophisticated CDP. With a properly created integration it provides valuable insight about our users, and with efficient data exports we can effectively reach them.
cons: During our cooperation (even in the period when I did not work with Meiro personally and know it indirectly from my coworkers) we did not encounter any negatives.

review_title: Flexible, Highly Secure and robust CDP solution for marketing and IT team
description: Overall, the solution is very robust & provides our marketing team a possibility to target & retarget with efficient data driven segments & activations helping us save a lot on the expenses on paid media.
author: Susi A.
pros: We have been using Meiro CDP for almost 5 years now. This is one solution that is very flexible from a hosting perspective and it has given us the possibility to have our data hosted within Indonesia and hence allowing us to be on-premise as well. The consulting team is very proactive with their services & the response time meets our requirements. The Meiro CDP product roadmap is promising & it's great to see that the Meiro team is always ahead of the game and other competitive CDPs in the market.
cons: Meiro's headquarter location is outside Indonesia, we hope someday Meiro will have their own office in Indonesia

review_title: We finally know our users! Great marketing experience!
description: We are cooperating for almost 3 years and there have never been any bad experience with Meiro. There is friendly and efective comunication and we are getting big support with any kind of issue or when we come up with new ideas. Meiro always help us
author: Adéla F.
pros: We have multiple brands in our company and thanks to Meiro identity stitching we are able to work with our users cross our brands and get to know them better. Let's not forget about support we have from Meiro itself. Colaboration with team in Meiro is on top level - great tech, data and business support. I used to work with another tools for segmentations and customer targeting through multiple channels. Comparing to Meiro I had to use SQL to be able to get an audiance. Meiro segmentations are really simple and user friendly even for data non-driven users.
cons: There is nothing wrong about my experience with Meiro.

review_title: streamlined customer data and insight-driven marketing
description: the platform converted a maze of disconnected records into a single source of truth, trimmed wasted ad spend by sharpening segmentation, and pushed campaign roi to heights we hadn’t reached before, all backed by a proactive success team that continually steers us toward new use cases.
author: Daniel A.
pros: before adopting meiro, our customer details were scattered across a jumble of tools; its identity resolution engine reassembles those fragments into live, 360-degree profiles, letting us trigger perfectly timed messages while the built-in analytics shine a light on the cohorts that bring the most value.
cons: we honestly haven’t found any serious drawbacks—meiro keeps outperforming every expectation we had. Totally fine.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to implement, huge benefit on data centralization
description: On-prem implementation option is very unique and let us overcame many regulatory problems in terms of data storage and management. It is very easy to implement with its well documented procedures and easy to use interfaces. Highly customizable connectors and workspaces lets you ingest or export the data as your creativity and need. All above lets you create very unique and accurate segments which are performing very high comparing to the generic audiences you would use in any ad platform.
author: Ari A.
pros: On-prem implementation option It is very easy to implement Highly customizable connectors and workspaces Segmentation features
cons: It is still very early stages for customer journey canvas and it may require some enhancements on attribute versions.

review_title: Great team, great tool
description: As a partner I have a great experience cooperating with Meiro team and delivering custom experience to our clients and their customers.
author: Karel M.
pros: The team is very professional and flexible, able to process custom scenarios and situations. It's constantly developed and improved, has great identity stitching and is able to handle tasks we expect.
cons: There were some updates for Meiro events tracking library which were not fully backward-complatible and we had to identify that and change tracking, but it was minor and scarce.

review_title: from data chaos to real-time customer intelligence
author: Lukas C.
pros: meiro’s plug-and-play connectors pull events from our webshop, crm, and email platform into a live profile graph, and the visual audience builder lets our marketers slice segments on the fly without waiting for the data team, so personalized offers hit customers within minutes of a key action.
cons: aside from occasionally diving into sql for very niche metrics and wishing the roadmap delivered a few more out-of-the-box predictive models, we have no meaningful complaints.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient and Reliable Tool for Data Management
author: Vojta F.
pros: I value the continuous development of the platform and the addition of new features. It’s clear that the team listens to user feedback and is committed to improvement, which makes Meiro a tool that grows alongside our needs.
cons: The reporting features could use more refinement. Compared to some competitors, the analytics and visualization options feel less polished and require extra effort to get the insights we need.

review_title: Great solution for 1st-party data strategy
description: Improves audience targeting through powerful segmentation features, leading to higher conversion rates and better engagement. By enabling real-time activation across multiple platforms, it ensures seamless execution of marketing campaigns. The platform's flexibility makes it a great fit for businesses looking to maximize the value of their first-party data.
author: Stanislav B.
pros: As third-party cookies are being phased out, we needed a reliable solution for leveraging first-party data. Meiro made the transition smooth, allowing us to create personalized experiences for our customers without relying on third-party tracking. Their segmentation tools are outstanding. We can combine behavioral, transactional, and demographic data to create highly targeted audiences. So we achieved significant increase in conversion rates on our ad campaigns and significantly better engagement across our owned channels. Another win for us has been the ability to activate data across multiple platforms in real-time. Meiro integrates seamlessly with our existing tech stack, making campaign execution much more efficient.
cons: We do not have any big concerns so far:) Everything is on track at the moment...
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Secure and robust CDP solution for advertising, marketing and personalisation!
author: Duncan R.
pros: I like that with Meiro, all the data points are provided by us, as they can work with our own internal data as well as event tracking on our applications. This gives us a lot of control over our data and ensures consistent data definitions for building segments. It has really helped empower our teams to create their own audiences, segment users for more personalized marketing, and supercharge our product personalization efforts!
cons: I feel that the marketing automations on the platform could be more robust, but they have an extensive product roadmap to address this in the future.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Personalization and CDP topics made easy by Meiro Platform!
author: Peter T.
pros: Meiro platform offers two products - Meiro Integrations (MI) and Meiro Business Explorer (MBE). MI offers really powerfull ETL based product with really nice technology - I trully appreciate it because it motivated employers to get to know basic skills aroung SQL, python and R. While learning abovementioned technologies, the employers can have immediate effect on results of company - it is really enjoyable feeling, if you prep some data pipeline that feeds CDP platform from which the audience is regularly exported to fuel your marketing campaign. Basically, you are part of end - to - end process of generating value for your company and by learning the core technologies like SQL, python and R. The possibilities within the platform are limitless - and that is no exageration at all. MBE offers interface to create customer based attributes, schedule audiences, setting rights, create banners etc.
cons: There is no community yet. Would be helpful to have group of users and exanging the ideas or to have a place to look for inspiration.

review_title: Demonstrable results with a wide range of clients
description: I love the fact that anytime I have experienced some new challenge in terms of client usecases, the Meiro team has always been able to come up with a solution and nothing has ever been impossible for them. Thanks to Meiro we have been able to successfully provide usecases with demonstrable results to a wide range of clients using various data structures.
author: Jan K.
pros: High responsibility, positive approach, skilled specialists, great communication, awesome value of the functions and pretty much endless data possibilities.
cons: It requires a high range of skills to be able to deploy the usecases "on your own".

review_title: A Good Choice
author: Uygar Doğaç Ö.
pros: As a technical consultant, one of the most important things for me is the communication between our team and the tech team we are working with. As long as I experienced, everyone I talked in Meiro team are so kind and helpful.
cons: Sometimes we need to wait for the Meiro team to take action but since they reply & take action really fast, I don't see that as a problem.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
